metadata.description: Generate Draw.io architecture diagrams with official AWS icons (mxgraph.aws4.*) from IaC code (CloudFormation, CDK, Terraform, SAM). Enterprise-ready output with layer management and PNG/SVG export.

plugins.name: aws-arch-drawio
plugins.description: AWS architecture diagram generator for Draw.io. Scans CloudFormation, CDK, Terraform, and SAM code, infers service relationships, and renders professional Draw.io diagrams with official AWS icons (mxgraph.aws4.*), tier-based layout, and layer management.
